built_recently: Shipped The Spread today. It finds where Polymarket and Kalshi price the same event at least 8 points apart and surfaces the biggest gaps front and center on the site and in the daily email. If two independent crowds disagree by that much on the same outcome, one of them is wrong. Now you can see exactly where that is every day.
coming_next: Three things queued up: Yesterday's Biggest Swings (save a daily snapshot and diff it), a Closing Soon rail for markets resolving in under 72 hours near 50/50, and sparklines on every market card showing the 7-day probability trend. The data collection for sparklines starts this run.
